<!--
Thank you for contributing a translation to Rosetta Check!

PR title convention:
  [<lang>] Fix translation of "..."        — for a single-string fix
  [<lang>] Update N strings                — for a bulk pass
  Add <Language> (<code>) translation      — for a brand-new locale
-->

## Summary

<!-- One line: what changed? -->

## Language(s) touched

- [ ] `en`
- [ ] `fr`
- [ ] `de`
- [ ] `ja`
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] I have set `state` to `translated` for every string I edited.
- [ ] I have read [STYLE-GUIDE.md](../STYLE-GUIDE.md) and followed the do-not-translate list.
- [ ] My PR only touches one language (or this is a brand-new language PR).
- [ ] I agree to the MIT licence terms in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#licence--contributor-agreement).

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything tricky? Strings you weren't sure about? Length concerns? -->
